name: parlayvu_interview
editing_style: Multi-camera show with isolated per-camera mics (the audio always carries every speaker regardless of who is on screen). Layout: use 1cam ONLY for a sustained single-speaker monologue, and show the person who is actually speaking — never use 1cam during back-and-forth dialogue. For any back-and-forth or group discussion use 3cam so whoever speaks is visible. Use 3cam_broll for b-roll beats. Keep b-roll inserts BRIEF: a static image or document should be on screen only ~6-12 seconds — make the b-roll scene short and cut back to a 3cam or 1cam camera beat for the rest of the topic; do NOT hold a static b-roll for a long stretch. When a guest references a specific document, report, study, product, or page on screen, cut to the b-roll clip whose description matches it at that exact moment. Avoid 2cam / 2cam_broll, and avoid more than two consecutive scenes with the same layout.
description: RamAir 'Straight from the Hart' podcast Show Kit — the constant per-episode format (background, music, bookends, render settings). Per-episode creative content (scenes, lower-third text, b-roll) comes from the planner and is merged onto this.

audio.notes: Music over intro (full length), opening show image, and into the host intro; fades out ~12s into the interview.
Music begins ~10s before the closing show image and plays through it.
